mapper.select: SELECT id, beer_name AS beerName, brand, category, notes, is_active AS active FROM sf_beer_select ORDER BY is_active DESC, beer_name ASC
SELECT id, beer_name AS beerName, brand, category, notes, is_active AS active FROM sf_beer_select WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_beer_select (beer_name, brand, category, notes, is_active) VALUES (#{beerName}, #{brand}, #{category}, #{notes}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE sf_beer_select SET beer_name = #{beerName}, brand = #{brand}, category = #{category}, notes = #{notes}, is_active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}
